ac_text: Tax should be calculated for taxable products.
title: Tax is calculated correctly for taxable products via UI
classification_rationale: This test validates the tax calculation feature for taxable products through the UI.
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Sales_User and has permission to create orders.
Taxable product with ID PROD-1001 exists in the system.
steps: Navigate to the Create Order page.
Enter Order Date.
Select Customer.
Add Product with ID PROD-1001 and Quantity 2.
Click the Calculate Tax button.
expected_result: Tax amount is calculated and displayed correctly.
review_feedback: correctness: Expected result is too vague — must be specific, measurable, and assertable; Layer expectations need tightening

correctness.reason: Expected result is too vague — must be specific, measurable, and assertable; Layer expectations need tightening

completeness.reason: Has preconditions, steps, test data, and expected result

defect_detection.reason: Primarily happy-path coverage
